title: russelia cuneata
intro: Russelia cuneata, also known as the Coral Plant, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America, characterized by its long, coral-like red flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and antifungal properties, which can help to treat wounds and infections. The health benefits of Russelia cuneata include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antioxidant, making it useful for treating a range of health issues. Russelia cuneata can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
